name: Gemini
description: Google Gemini — text, multi-turn chat, embeddings, model listing, and native image generation (Nano Banana 2 / Gemini 3.1 flash-image).

settings.label: Default text model
settings.help: Used when a text/chat tool omits model. e.g. gemini-3.1-flash-preview, gemini-flash-latest. See gemini_list_models.

settings.label: Default image model
settings.help: Native Gemini image model. gemini-3.1-flash-image = Nano Banana 2 (latest); gemini-3-pro-image = Nano Banana Pro (higher fidelity).
